evidence_basis: Round 4 full experiments (r4a_gemma_access_check, r4a_direct_label_generation, r4a_eda_direct_validation, r4b_ravel_probes_proper, r4b_shuffled_control, r4b_crossdomain_analysis_updated, r4c_llama_replication)
paper_title: Characterizing SAE Absorption: A Regime-Specific Weight-Only Detector and Three-Subtype Taxonomy

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: 3/8 configs pass AUROC >= 0.65: Gemma L5-16k (0.698 proxy), L12-16k (0.776 proxy), GPT-2 L6 (0.650 direct). GPT-2 L10 reversed (0.336). Taxonomy confirmed: early 72-75%, late 13%. H3 cross-domain collapsed by shuffled control (0/3 domains exceed null). ITAC 2.69% FN reduction (synthetic). H6 falsified.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 CONFIRMED (SynthSAEBench F1=0.974). H2/D-EDA FALSIFIED (EDA=1-dec_cos identity; D-EDA delta=0). H3 FALSIFIED (shuffled control matches real; probe gate fails at 59.5% best). H4 CONFIRMED (taxonomy primary contribution). H5 FALSIFIED (2.69% vs 20% target). H6 FALSIFIED (partial rho +0.37).

path_to_full_result.evidence: Two-contribution paper publishable now with current evidence. No blocking experiments remain. Cross-domain dropped. Title revision required. ITAC and H6 become appendix negative results.

novelty.evidence: EDA=1-dec_cos not independently novel as formula (SAEBench uses dec_cos). Novelty is: (a) formal lower-bound theorem, (b) regime characterization, (c) cross-model validation. Taxonomy still 8/10 novelty — no prior three-subtype partition or 75% early-dominance finding in literature.

resource_efficiency.evidence: All experiments complete. No additional GPU budget needed. ~6 GPU-hours total over all rounds. Publishing now avoids indefinite waiting for gated model access.

cand_lca_sae.note: Pivot trigger partially met (H3 null) but not fully triggered (EDA detection still holds in favorable regime; H4 taxonomy is independent, strong contribution). Do not activate unless EDA AUROC falls below 0.60 across all configs AND taxonomy finding is disputed.

cand_scaling_laws.note: H6 falsified. Retain as Phase 4 supplementary analysis within main paper. Do not activate as standalone.

H1_eda_lower_bound.evidence: SynthSAEBench AUROC=1.0, F1=0.974. Theoretical bound derivation verified. Mann-Whitney group separation p=6.4e-5 at Gemma L12-16k.
H1_eda_lower_bound.r4_update: No new experiments. Theorem and synthetic validation stand.

H2_eda_predictive_power.evidence: Scalar EDA: 3/8 configs pass AUROC >= 0.65 (regime-specific). D-EDA: fully falsified — EDA=1-dec_cos identity confirmed (delta=0.0 on all validated configs including Gemma, GPT-2, Llama). D-EDA contributes no information beyond scalar EDA.
H2_eda_predictive_power.r4_update: R4A confirms EDA=dec_cosine_negated identity (Pearson r=-1.0, Spearman r=-1.0). D-EDA hypothesis falsified. Regime-specific EDA detection stands.

H3_cross_domain_generalization.evidence: R4B: probe quality gate fails for all 3 RAVEL hierarchies (best: 59.5% city-continent, gate: 85%). R4B shuffled control: real absorption rates indistinguishable from shuffled null for all 3 domains (0/3 pass p95 threshold; ratio range 0.98-2.09). Intra-RAVEL rho drops from 0.924 (R3, n=6, proxy probes) to 0.667 (R4, n=3, bridge-model probes). Both Gemma 2B and Llama-3.1-8B remain HF-gated.
H3_cross_domain_generalization.r4_update: H3 contribution collapses. The cross-domain claim cannot be supported with available bridge-model probes. Reported as a limitation requiring same-model probe access (gated models) for validation.

H4_three_subtype_taxonomy.evidence: L12-16k: n=16 absorbed; early 75.0%, late 12.5%, diffuse 12.5%. L12-65k: n=65 absorbed; early 72.3%, late 13.8%, diffuse 13.8%. KW p=0.0002 at L12-65k. Late > early EDA holds at all 5 thresholds (0.20-0.40). Threshold sensitivity: early% drops to ~32% at tau=0.2 (report as caveat).
H4_three_subtype_taxonomy.r4_update: No new taxonomy experiments in R4. R3 finding stands. Threshold sensitivity caveat must be reported.

H5_itac_efficacy.evidence: Mean FN reduction: 2.69% (L12-65k, synthetic activations). Target: 20%. Gap ratio: 7.4x below target. 1/10 targets show improvement (j_idx=61217: 18.9%). R4D (real text activations) not completed.
H5_itac_efficacy.r4_update: R4D not run (optional task). Synthetic activation result (2.69%) stands as primary evidence. Real-activation test remains outstanding but is not needed for the two-contribution paper framing.

H6_scaling_sign_reversal.evidence: Partial rho(width, absorption | L0) = +0.368 (positive; H6 predicts negative). L0 range 65-72 across all configs — insufficient variation to test confound. H6 falsification confirmed.
H6_scaling_sign_reversal.r4_update: No new scaling experiments in R4. R3 finding confirmed.

reasons: GPT-2 L6 direct-label AUROC=0.650 confirms EDA detection with exact Chanin labels — model-agnostic evidence without proxy label caveats
H4 taxonomy (three-subtype partition, 72-75% early-dominance) is independently confirmed and constitutes a primary contribution regardless of EDA or cross-domain status
Falsification conditions for full pivot not met: EDA AUROC is not below 0.60 across all configs (3/8 pass at >= 0.65); H4 taxonomy is robust
H3 cross-domain collapse is a genuine finding (shuffled control = real absorption signal), not a methodology error — requires gated model access to resolve
EDA=1-dec_cos identity confirmed across 3 architectures — enables reframing as systematic validation and regime characterization of an existing metric
Two-contribution paper is publishable with current evidence: no additional blocking experiments needed
Sunk cost check passed: decision based on current evidence strength alone
framing_recommendation: TWO_CONTRIBUTION_PAPER: (1) EDA (= 1 - dec_cosine) as regime-specific absorption detector — reliable at 16k-width SAEs, early-to-mid layers; formal lower-bound theorem; cross-model validated on Gemma 2B (proxy) and GPT-2 Small (direct labels); EDA=DecCos equivalence confirmed across 3 architectures as a systematic validation finding. (2) Three-subtype absorption taxonomy (early/late/diffuse) with early-dominance finding (72-75% early-type at L12, tau=0.3) — reframes dominant failure mode as dictionary coverage, not encoder alignment. Cross-domain evidence downgraded to limitation (H3 collapses with shuffled control). ITAC, D-EDA, H5, H6 all reported as negative results.
paper_framing_changes_required: Revise title: remove 'Cross-Domain Generalization'; use 'Characterizing SAE Absorption: A Regime-Specific Weight-Only Detector and Three-Subtype Taxonomy'
Remove cross-domain contribution from primary contributions list
Acknowledge EDA=1-dec_cos equivalence to SAEBench metric; reframe novelty as theorem + regime characterization + cross-model validation
Report H3 as a negative result: bridge-model RAVEL probes insufficient; shuffled control matches real signal; requires gated model access
Drop D-EDA from all primary claims; demote to a mathematical footnote confirming the equivalence
Move ITAC, H5, H6 to appendix negative results section
Add threshold sensitivity caveat for early-dominance finding (75% at tau=0.3; 32% at tau=0.2)
next_actions: Revise proposal.md to two-contribution structure (title, abstract, contributions section)
Proceed to writing phase — go_write=true per r4_writing_gate.json
Report EDA=dec_cos equivalence prominently; cite SAEBench Karvonen et al. 2503.09532
Report H3 as failed validation attempt with honest explanation (gated models, shuffled control evidence)
All negative results (D-EDA, ITAC, H5, H6) moved to appendix
Venue: target NeurIPS 2026 MI Workshop or EMNLP 2026

backup_activation_conditions.cand_lca_sae: Activate only if: (a) EDA AUROC falls below 0.60 on ALL tested configs (including GPT-2 L6 direct labels) AND (b) H4 taxonomy is disputed by reviewers. Neither condition currently applies.
backup_activation_conditions.cand_amortization_gap_experiment: Activate as supplementary experiment (1-2 GPU-hours, no new downloads) if the taxonomy finding needs additional mechanistic support. Feedforward vs. OMP comparison on Gemma L12-16k would separate Tang et al. vs. O'Neill et al. explanations for early absorption dominance.
